##  Experiments using quantum circuits 
This is a collection of algorithms and experiments written in and using Cirq. A few use only base Cirq; the rest use additional code stored in ReCirq, a GitHub repository for research code that uses and builds upon Cirq. 
[Cirq GitHub](https://github.com/quantumlib/Cirq) [ReCirq GitHub](https://github.com/quantumlib/ReCirq)
##  Algorithms in base Cirq 
Algorithms and experiments that use only default Cirq code. 
###  [ Textbook Algorithms Workshop ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/textbook_algorithms)
A workshop notebook with examples that covers algorithms commonly shown in quantum textbooks. 
###  [ Shor's Algorithm ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/shor)
An implementation of the famous integer factorization algorithm by Peter Shor. 
###  [ Variational Quantum Eigensolver ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/variational_algorithm)
An example of computing the ground state of a Hamiltonian using the variational principle. 
###  [ Quantum Walks ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/quantum_walks)
An example of the quantum analog of a random walk algorithm. 
###  [ Fourier Checking ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/fourier_checking)
A demonstration of the separation between quantum and classical computers. 
###  [ Hidden Linear Function problem ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/hidden_linear_function)
An example showing quantum separation with a constant-depth solution. 
##  ReCirq Experiments 
Research experiments that use additional library code that resides in the external ReCirq repository. 
##  ReCirq Guide 
How to use and contribute to ReCirq. 
###  [ Research with ReCirq ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/research)
How to use this code. 
###  [ ReCirq experiment structure ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/guide/data_collection_idioms)
How ReCirq experiments are structured. 
###  [ Data collection ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/guide/data_collection)
How ReCirq experiments collect data. 
###  [ Data analysis ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/guide/data_analysis)
How ReCirq experiments analyze data. 
###  [ Best practices ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/guide/best_practices)
Additional advice on writing ReCirq experiments. 
##  QAOA 
Tutorials and examples with the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa)
###  [ Example problems ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/example_problems)
Introductory QAOA problems. 
###  [ Tasks ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/tasks)
QAOA experiment Task object. 
###  [ Precomputed analysis ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/precomputed_analysis)
QAOA analysis with precomputed optimal angles. 
###  [ Landscape analysis ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/landscape_analysis)
QAOA analysis with a hardware landscape. 
###  [ Optimization analysis ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/optimization_analysis)
QAOA analysis with an optimization path. 
###  [ Hardware grid circuits ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/hardware_grid_circuits)
QAOA on grid-shaped hardware. 
###  [ Routing with tket ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qaoa/routing_with_tket)
Use t|ket> to map QAOA to a generic device. 
##  Hartree-Fock VQE 
How to run the Hartree-Fock Variational Quantum Eigensolver experiment. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/hfvqe)
###  [ Quickstart ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/hfvqe/quickstart)
A short tutorial to show HFVQE in action. 
###  [ Molecular data ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/hfvqe/molecular_data)
How to make molecule files for use with HFVQE. 
##  Fermi-Hubbard 
Simulating spin and charge dynamics with a Fermi-Hubbard model. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/fermi_hubbard)
###  [ Experiment example ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/fermi_hubbard/experiment_example)
End-to-end with a single instance of the Fermi-Hubbard experiment. 
###  [ Spin-charge separation results ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/fermi_hubbard/publication_results)
Experimental data collected and analyzed. 
##  Quantum Scrambling 
Use out-of-time-order (OTOC) correlators to demonstrate quantum scrambling. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/otoc)
###  [ Experiment example ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/otoc/otoc_example)
Build, run and plot an OTOC circuit. 
##  Toric Code 
Explore the toric code model of interacting qubits. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/toric_code)
###  [ Ground State ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/toric_code/toric_code_ground_state)
Create a toric code ground state. 
##  Kardar-Parisi-Zhang Physics 
Probe the dynamics of transferred magnetization in the Heisenberg spin chain. 
###  [ Experiment example ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/kpz/kpz)
##  Quantum-Classical Quantum Monte Carlo 
How to run QCQMC for quantum chemistry applications. 
###  [ Overview ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qcqmc)
###  [ Code Layout ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qcqmc/high_level)
A short tutorial on the code structure. 
###  [ End-to-End Example ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qcqmc/full_workflow)
How to generate a shadow trial wavefunction for a molecular system 
###  [ Experimental Wavefunctions ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/qcqmc/experimental_wavefunctions)
Analyze published experimental wavefunctions. 
##  Lattice Gauge Theory 
Simulations for Charges and Strings in (2+1)D Lattice Gauge Theories 
###  [ Experiment Example ](https://quantumai.google/cirq/experiments/lattice_gauge/lattice_gauge)
###  Code Layout
